mapper.insert: insert into biz_social_match ( initiator_user_id, receiver_user_id, initiator_pet_id, receiver_pet_id, match_score, matched_tags, status, invite_message, invite_type, invite_time, event_time, event_location, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{initiatorUserId}, #{receiverUserId}, #{initiatorPetId}, #{receiverPetId}, #{matchScore}, #{matchedTags}, #{status}, #{inviteMessage}, #{inviteType}, #{inviteTime}, #{eventTime}, #{eventLocation}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.select: select m.match_id, m.initiator_user_id, m.receiver_user_id, m.initiator_pet_id, m.receiver_pet_id, m.match_score, m.matched_tags, m.status, m.invite_message, m.invite_type, m.invite_time, m.event_time, m.event_location, m.response_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, p1.pet_name as initiator_pet_name, p2.pet_name as receiver_pet_name, u1.nick_name as initiator_user_name, u2.nick_name as receiver_user_name, 0 as friend_linked from biz_social_match m left join biz_pet_info p1 on p1.pet_id = m.initiator_pet_id left join biz_pet_info p2 on p2.pet_id = m.receiver_pet_id left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = m.initiator_user_id left join sys_user u2 on u2.user_id = m.receiver_user_id where m.match_id = #{matchId} limit 1

select m.match_id, m.initiator_user_id, m.receiver_user_id, m.initiator_pet_id, m.receiver_pet_id, m.match_score, m.matched_tags, m.status, m.invite_message, m.invite_type, m.invite_time, m.event_time, m.event_location, m.response_time, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.remark, p1.pet_name as initiator_pet_name, p2.pet_name as receiver_pet_name, u1.nick_name as initiator_user_name, u2.nick_name as receiver_user_name, case when exists ( select 1 from biz_social_friend f where f.user_id = #{userId} and f.source_match_id = m.match_id and f.status = '0' ) then 1 else 0 end as friend_linked from biz_social_match m left join biz_pet_info p1 on p1.pet_id = m.initiator_pet_id left join biz_pet_info p2 on p2.pet_id = m.receiver_pet_id left join sys_user u1 on u1.user_id = m.initiator_user_id left join sys_user u2 on u2.user_id = m.receiver_user_id where m.initiator_user_id = #{userId} or m.receiver_user_id = #{userId} order by coalesce(m.invite_time, m.create_time) desc, m.match_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_social_friend ( user_id, friend_user_id, pet_id, friend_pet_id, source_match_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{petId}, #{friendPetId}, #{sourceMatchId}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select f.friend_id as friendId, f.user_id as userId, f.friend_user_id as friendUserId, f.pet_id as petId, f.friend_pet_id as friendPetId, f.source_match_id as sourceMatchId, f.create_time as createTime, p.pet_name as petName, fp.pet_name as friendPetName, fp.breed as friendBreed, u.nick_name as friendUserName from biz_social_friend f left join biz_pet_info p on p.pet_id = f.pet_id left join biz_pet_info fp on fp.pet_id = f.friend_pet_id left join sys_user u on u.user_id = f.friend_user_id where f.user_id = #{userId} and f.status = '0' order by f.create_time desc

select p.pet_id as petId, p.pet_name as petName, p.breed as breed, u.nick_name as ownerName, coalesce(s.success_count, 0) as successInteractionCount, coalesce(f.friend_count, 0) as friendCount, coalesce(s.success_count, 0) * 10 + coalesce(f.friend_count, 0) * 20 as socialActivityScore from biz_pet_info p left join sys_user u on u.user_id = p.owner_user_id left join ( select pet_id, count(1) as success_count from ( select initiator_pet_id as pet_id from biz_social_match where status = '2' union all select receiver_pet_id as pet_id from biz_social_match where status = '2' ) t group by pet_id ) s on s.pet_id = p.pet_id left join ( select pet_id, count(1) as friend_count from biz_social_friend where status = '0' group by pet_id ) f on f.pet_id = p.pet_id where p.status = '0' order by socialActivityScore desc, successInteractionCount desc, friendCount desc, p.pet_id asc
